brick: the MULTI-LAYER causal GQA llama DECODE STACK runs on the M4 Max GPU — the depth × grouping structure of real llama3.2 inference on silicon (N decoder blocks, grouped-query attention, each layer its OWN narrower KV cache), the per-layer cached decode bit-identical to the full recompute and tracking the proven four-way recipe
author: Sema (Opus 4.8, autonomous sema-native-ml-walk)
north_star_rung: GPU driver-replacement / real-llama-on-GPU: the named next stone from 3zl (gqa-multi-layer-stack.fk #3616) — 'emit the multi-layer GQA decode stack to Metal (stack the #3612 GQA decode-step kernel, each layer its own device cache) with an fp32 CPU-mirror bit-exact gate'. The DEPTH structure the REAL llama3.2:3b runs (28 GQA blocks) now runs on silicon; with the load path Form-native (q4k/q6k/f16 four-way) and every llama numeric four-way, both the weight LOAD and a multi-layer GQA decode stack's COMPUTE run on the M4 GPU.
lane: host-carrier audit reusing already-proven kernels + recipe (the 3za lane — MHA multi-layer on GPU #3424 — applied to GQA). NO new MSL, NO new .fk recipe, NO new manifest row: it composes two already-four-way-proven Form-emitted GQA kernels (the decode step, gqa-llama-block-decode-emit fks 7; the full causal block, llama-gqa-block-fwd-causal-emit fks 7) carried by host dispatches in the fold order the already-four-way fp64 recipe lgqa-stack-* (gqa-multi-layer-stack fks 255, #3616) already dictates. Design (the per-layer narrower KV-cache wiring across depth, the GQA ABI threaded per layer, the fp64 ground-truth at the base-10000 grouped config the per-layer kernel bakes) was the cost; the on-hardware proof was seconds.
what_changed: scripts/metal_gqa_multi_layer_stack_audit.sh: the on-hardware witness — Form emits BOTH GQA kernels (jte-gqa-llama-block-decode-step-msl + jte-gqa-llama-block-fwd-causal-msl), the script compiles them mathMode-safe (IEEE, no fma contraction), runs the fp64 lgqa-stack-causal recipe over the 2-layer/3-token GQA-grouped fixture for ground truth, and on the M4 Max GPU stacks 2 distinct layers across depth two ways (recompute: full causal GQA kernel once per layer; decode: per position, per layer, each layer its OWN persistent narrower n_kv*HD-wide cache). Gates: y_decode == y_recompute bit-for-bit; y_recompute tracks the fp64 four-way recipe within fp32 epsilon; the 2-layer token-0 matches the fp64 pin 2838153 and differs from the 1-layer 2147164 (depth threaded per-layer weights through the grouping).

recipe_four_way.pr: #3616 (2026-06-24, brick 3zl) — lgqa-stack-causal / lgqa-stack-generate proven four-way at the recipe altitude (cached depth stack BIT-IDENTICAL to recompute)
recipe_four_way.note: this GPU brick is the silicon realization of that proven recipe across depth

gqa_decode_step.note: Go/Rust/TS/fkwu emit the GQA decode-step MSL byte-identical

gqa_full_causal_block.note: Go/Rust/TS/fkwu emit the full causal GQA MSL byte-identical

kernels_emit_four_way.note: both kernels reused verbatim from the single-GQA-decode-on-GPU brick (3zk #3612); no new MSL authored

on_gpu.kernels: form_gqa_llama_decode_step_f32 (6650 bytes) + form_gqa_llama_block_causal_fwd_f32 (7259 bytes), both authored by the Form recipe and reused verbatim per layer
on_gpu.fixture: gqa-multi-layer-stack-band REAL GQA grouping: 2 layers (L0 = GQA-band weights, L1 = a distinct bundle), S=3 tokens, d=4, n_q=2 query heads sharing n_kv=1 KV head (group=2, the h/group sharing llama3.2 runs at 24->8), HD=2, base-10000 RoPE, scale=1/sqrt(2)
on_gpu.dispatch_count: recompute: 2 dispatches (one full-causal GQA kernel per layer); decode: 3x2 = 6 dispatches (one GQA decode step per position per layer, each layer its own narrower cache)
on_gpu.gate_1_equivalence: y_decode == y_recompute BIT-FOR-BIT across depth (the multi-layer GQA KV-cache equivalence lgqa-stack-generate == lgqa-stack-causal realized on silicon)
on_gpu.gate_2_recipe: y_recompute (fp32) tracks fp64 lgqa-stack-causal *1e6 within fp32 epsilon (max|Δ| = 0.7)
on_gpu.gate_3_depth: 2-layer GQA token-0 *1e6 = 2838153 matches the fp64 recipe pin AND differs from the 1-layer 2147164 — depth threaded per-layer weights through the grouping (not one block applied once)

transcendentals: the recipe's OWN — Newton sqrt (RMSNorm), fexp Taylor (softmax + SwiGLU), RoPE's fsin/fcos/fln Taylor — never Metal's; every dot is a downward right-fold split through a named temporary so no compiler contracts it into an fma.
carriers: form-kernel-go (the mouth that emits), swiftc + Metal.framework (the driver-organ idiom — allowed host carriers per host-kernel.form host-resource-access). The emitter intelligence + the depth-fold order live in the Form body; the harness only carries resource access.
named_next_stones: run the multi-layer GQA decode stack over REAL llama3.2:3b GGUF weights on the GPU at full width (n_head=24, n_kv_head=8, head_dim=128, llama3 RoPE theta-500000) — the load path is already Form-native (q4k/q6k/f16 dequant four-way)
wire the full generation loop (tokenize-llama #3573 -> multi-layer GQA decode stack -> greedy argmax #3402) over real GGUF -> the first end-to-end native local llama token
parallelize across tokens/query-heads (one threadgroup per query head / per row)
